productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Solid Brown Wallets
description: Crafted from textured synthetic leather, this dark brown wallet from Reid and Taylor is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a textured finish, this tri-fold wallet has an embossed brand name on the upper and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use.Dimensions: 11.5 cm X 9 cmSynthetic leather for flexibility and durabilityOne compartment with fabric inner lining on the outsideOne compartment with fabric lining on the insideMultiple partitions on the tri-fold to stash away cards and coinsCareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
